description.value: The {CShi{cmm{Rer{ring {dTime {MPortal{x

This spring flows through the alcove and its seems to never stop.

A fountain sits here, gushing water.
A small wooden sign with an important message written on it is posted here.
A small wooden sign with important information on it is posted here.
A small wooden sign with an important message on it is posted here.
A fountain spewing green liquid sits here, waiting to be drunk from.
A very nice gold ring.
An alter stands here.
This test item says "pick me up" right on it.
A pit for donations is here.
A bubbling fountain ready to quinch your thirst is here.
A strange bubbling vial lies here.
A strange white potion lies here.
A potion of blessing lies here.
The shining blade gives off a defensive aura.
A fountain made from pure, untarnished gold sits here.
A potion of antidote sits here.
A potion of healing sits here
A potion of flying sits here

A brass key lays upon the ground.
A very weathered oak chest sits in the corner.
A hollowed out tree stump sit here, waiting to be filled.
A Pool of Blood sits here.

(no description)
A fountain used to clense all ailments sits here
A golden holy symbol of true fiath lies here
A dustpan made of the blackest obsidian lies here

A summoner's gem made from the abyss itself lies here
A finely crafted steel claymore lies here
A wooden sword made for a child lies here
A Double sided axe made of the finest steel lies here
A plump maroon granadilla lies here
A ripe freshly picked green apple sits here
A small black pepper lies here
A red summoners key lies here
Frost sits here
Here stands a giant fountain shaped like a dragon.
Soul Stealer, sword of Zeddicus.
Average looking robes with intricate designs all over them.
A sword that appears to be made out of shadows is here
A folded black trench coat from the highlands lies here.
A small metallic token with the emblem of {RC{rh{Ra{ro{Rs{x, the father god, lies here.
A piece of armor for guarding your body.
{DA phantom outline of a key flickers here.{x
A black ponytail lies here
A strange squigly pattern of ink puddles here.
A rainbow colored potion lies here shimmering.
{DA {Rflaming {Bblue {Dsteel sword known as '{WMarshmellow Roaster{D' lies here.{x
{WA breast plate made of {Bblue steel {Wdesigned to resist marshmellows lies here.{x
{DA plane of phase energy formed into the shape of a blade floats here.{x
A great Solamnic sword lies here, glimmering in the surrounding light.
A great piece of plate armor of the Solamnic Knights lies here.
A wide-bladed knife sits undisturbed on the floor.
A well worn table with five chairs sits in the middle of the room.
A few long tables with simple stools are scattered about the room.
A shot of whisky is on the ground here.
A pint of ale is on the ground here.
A mug of mead is on the ground here.
A delicious looking meat wrap is on the ground, getting dirty.
A large bowl of vegetable beef stew has been placed on the ground here.

title.value: a bowl of vegetable beef stew

description.value: A few shadowy booths, allowing privacy, line the walls.
A fine broadsword is lying here on the ground.
A steel breastplate emblazoned with the sign of a crown lies here.
A small fountain is here, gently gushing water.
A Pool of {WShimmering Light{x is here.
A steel chest for equipment donations sits here.
A drinking fountain stands in the center of the room, inviting you for a sip.
A pit is here for item donations to the Knighthood.
A light meal of bread, fruit and cheese is here for your refreshment.
A large mahogany table sits at the head of the hall.
A silver water pitcher sits upon each table, offering refreshment to those gathered here.
A heavy platinum key sits here.
A fountain of white marble is here.
A backpack lies here.
A wooden desk sits along the south wall of the room.
An exquisite desk sits in the middle of the room, cluttered with paper.
An ornately carved chair sits behind the desk.
A simple wooden chair sits by the door.
A small silver key lies here, engraved with a rose.
Water flows from a large fountain here.

title.value: a large fountain with a statue in it

description.value: A longsword is lying here humming strange sounds.
A short bow with some runes inscribed has been droped here.
A very sharp looking dagger draws your attention from the ground.
A short metalic staff hovers over the ground.
A shining breastplate has been droped here.
A pierce of chain mail is lying on the ground.
A brown leather armor has been droped here.
A set of grey robes floating around perfectly.
A {Ygolden{x perch is here standing against the counter.
A giant Turtle dragon shell lies here.
A farming scythe lies here.
A simple wooden staff lies here, decorated with blue feathers.
A bright silver bracer lies here.
There is a fire pit here, still smoldering.
There is a house key on the ground.
There is a coathanger on the ground.
There is a silver longsword on the ground.
A pair of farmer�s longjohns are lying here.
Some ancient gold coins lie piled up in a heap.

title.value: a heap of ancient gold coins

description.value: Some ancient gold coins lie piled up in a heap on the floor.

title.value: a heap of ancient gold coins

description.value: A small pile of grain lies here.
There is a suit of leather armor on the ground.
There is a chamorro dagger lying here.
There is a long, wicked-looking polearm lying here.
A large pile of skin is lying here.
A helmet made of leather and iron lies here.
Some damaged leather armor lies here.
Some old boots are here, covered in dust.
A bright piece of steel lies here, crudely fashioned into a chestpiece.
A sword has been dropped here.
{R(Burning){x A campfire is here giving off light.
Some type of old leather rag lies here.
A harp made of gold lies here.
A juicy apple lies here.
A HUGE apple tree is here.
A rotten apple lies here.
A broken wooden sign is here
A dead tree branch pokes up through a crack.
An enormous dead tree stands here.
A plain-looking longsword is resting here.
A black bow is here.
A club has been thrown here.
A broken human skull is here.
A tattoo is here.
A huge black sword lies here.
A very sharp dagger lies here.
An arcane-looking tunic lies here on the ground.
A small tent is here.
A tattoo of the {WKnights{x of {DTakhisis{x lies here.
A ring lies here, covered in dust.
A dart lies in the dirt.
A large wooden sign has been posted here.
A set of bone gauntlets lies here, now where's the rest of the set?
A pair of bone boots lies here, now where's the rest of the set?
A large bone helm lies here, now where's the rest of the set?
A set of bone vambraces lies here, now where's the rest of the set?
A great trident lies here.
A small cubic box lies here glowing magically.
A bone shield lies here, now where's the rest of the set?
A fractured femur lies here on the ground.
An altar to the gods of darkness sits here, filled with offerings.
A beautiful fountain made of obsidian, flowing with cold water.
A large set of obsidian gates stand here, leading to parts unknown.
A pile of dirty, dark colored robes lie here.
A long black wooden staff with a large sickle at the end of it lies here.

title.value: {xA Sickle Staff of the Black Order

description.value: A black robe lies here in a wrinkled pile on the ground.
A heavy steel shortsword lies here in the dust.
A blood stained mercenary's sword lies here unused.
An iron axe lies in the dust here awaiting a master.
A battle mace sits here awaiting battle.
({DDirty{x) A fountain is here for use by the public.
A long and dark dagger sits here in the dust.
A murky brew sits here glowing!
A forged longsword sits here unused.
A slimy fish sits here ready to be eaten.
A worn seashell lies here in the sand.
A statue of an elephant sits here.
A pile of {Bfish{x that the old man caught lies here.
A buoyant life vest sits here.
A board has been left on the floor here.
A long and slim forged dagger lies in the dust here.
A sexy leather bra sits here awaiting a woman.
A sexy leather thong awaits a woman here.
A long curved weapon lies here in the sand.
A large {Diron{x anvil sits here.
A set of wooden shelves sits on the west wall.
A cooling {Bpool{x sits next to the {Diron{x anvil.
A potion of stammering and stuttering lies here.

title.value: a potion of stammering and stuttering

description.value: A pair of massive {Diron{x doors stand between you and sunlight.
A potion of vitality lies here.
A potion of giant control lies before you.
A potion of divine protection is on the ground here.
A bar of smelted iron sits here, waiting to be forged into something useful.
A cut piece of leather suitable for raw material lies here.
A bar of smelted silver sits here, waiting to be forged into something useful.
A potion of recall lies here.
A bar of smelted steel sits here, waiting to be forged into something useful.
A blacksmith's hammer sits here, unused.
A can of mining food rations lies here.
A large fountain with a hammer atop an anvil on the center.
A large, beautifully crafted Dwarven axe lies here.

title.value: a Dwarven axe of the Forge

description.value: A beautifully crafted breastplate of Dwarven make, lies here.

title.value: a Dwarven breastplate of the Forge

description.value: A pool of slime covered with bugs and beetles.
A set of dragon scale arm guards lie here.
A necklace of long sharp bat fangs lies here in the dust.
A wooden club with a cracked handle lies here in the dirt.
A bone sharpened to a tip lies here collecting slime.
A long staff made of obsidian lies here on the ground.
A parchment of skin lies here getting trod on.
Robe with many hidden pockets lie here on the ground.
A crystal rapier lies here glowing like polished glass.
A immweapon is here
A tattoo of a hideous creature sits here, waiting to be branded on.
A bottle of {Rblood{x churns before your eyes.
A potion of {mpurple{x liquid bubbles over its beakers' flange, right before your eyes.
A wooden sign lays on the ground here.
A round vial of a bubbling {Bblue{x liquid foams before you.
A large archer's bow lies here.
A wooden sign lays on the ground here.
A well-crafted replica of Raistlin Majere's staff lies here.
A wooden arrow is here.
A quiver made to hold many arrows, lies here.
A tattoo with a bloody scythe design rests on the ground.
A potion of poison lies here.
A large staff, once thought to be Hiddukel's, hovers before you.
An empty jar lies here.
A dim {Bblue{x light glows here.
A piece of seaweed is floating here in the water.
A large, sharp dagger glimmers on the ground.
A long flowing green cloak lies here on the ground.

title.value: a guardian cloak of the Thieves

description.value: A shimmering {Wwhite{x light burns into the ground here.
A large wooden sign with a picture on it is posted here.
A thick overgrowth of plants sprout up from the ground here.
A large {Gmoss{x covered boulder sits here.
A large wooden log has fallen, allowing a place to sit.
A crystal key lies here, shimmering in the presence of light.
A golden key lies here.
A {Ygolden{x treasure chest marked with the symbol of Hiddukel sits here.
A red moon rock magically floats here in the air.
A plump red berry glistens with just a touch of moisture.
A sturdy, oaken staff lies on the ground.
A magical pill lies here.
A sturdy oak staff, with detailed runes carved into it, lies here.
A potion filled with a black liquid lies here.
A teleport potion lies here.
The skin hide of a leopard lies here, smelling of dead animal.
